entities.name: WILD CICER
entities.description: Wild species of the Cicer genus including C. bijugum, C. cuneatum, C. chorassanicum, C. echinospermum, C. judaicum, C. pinnatifidum, C. reticulatum and C. yamashitae

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease caused by Fusarium oxysporum f.sp. ciceris

entities.name: ROOT ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting the root system caused by fungi such as Rhizoctonia bataticola and Macrophomina phaseolina

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungus that causes Fusarium wilt

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: A fungus that causes root rot

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: A fungus that causes root rot

entities.name: PATANCHERU

entities.description: The state in India where the study took place

entities.description: The country where the study took place

entities.name: JG 62
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar susceptible to wilt

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death of plants used to measure disease susceptibility

entities.description: A fungus isolated from dead plants in the study

entities.description: A fungus isolated from dead plants in the study

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of wild Cicer accessions to withstand wilt and root rots

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating wild Cicer accessions for disease resistance

relationships.description: identified for combined resistance to wilt and root rots
